---
title: "Kevin Fanning"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://youtube.com/@Xin_IronShark
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com

---

Hi. I'm Kevin, though online you will usually find me under the handle Xin. I served 2 terms in the military, and was medically retired. Since then I have studies Art, specifically expressionist painting, and sculpture. Now I am preparing myself to go to college, and hopefully study physics.
